005/***************************************************************/
006package com.stuypulse.robot;
007
008import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.auton.DoNothingAuton;
009import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.feeder.FeederSetForward;
010import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.feeder.FeederSetIdle;
011import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.handoff.HandoffSetForward;
012import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.handoff.HandoffSetIdle;
013import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeAgitateFastOnce;
014import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeDigest;
015import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetHomingDown;
016import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetIdle;
017import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetIntake;
018import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.intake.IntakeSetOuttake;
019import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.leds.LEDDefaultCommand;
020import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterAddToBonusVelocity;
021import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterSetFerry;
022import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterSetManual;
023import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterSetShoot;
024import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.shooter.ShooterWaitForSpinUp;
025import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.SwerveDriveDrive;
026import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.SwerveDriveResetRotation;
027import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.SwerveDriveXMode;
028import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.driveAligned.SwerveDriveAlignToFerryZone;
029import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.swerve.driveAligned.SwerveDriveAlignToHub;
030import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Field;
031import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Ports;
032import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.feeder.Feeder;
033import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.handoff.Handoff;
034import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.intake.Intake;
035import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.leds.LEDController;
036import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.shooter.Shooter;
037import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.swerve.CommandSwerveDrivetrain;
038import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.vision.LimelightVision;
039import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.smartdashboard.SendableChooser;
040import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.smartdashboard.SmartDashboard;
041import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Command;
042import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.Commands;
043import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.CommandXboxController;
044import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.button.Trigger;
045import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.sysid.SysIdRoutine.Direction;
046
047/**
048 * <h2>Robot Container Class</h2>
049 * 
050 * This class is where the bulk of the robot should be declared. Since Command-based is a
051 * "declarative" paradigm, very little robot logic should actually be handled in the {@link Robot}
052 * periodic methods (other than the scheduler calls). Instead, the structure of the robot (including
053 * subsystems, commands, and trigger mappings) should be declared here.
054 */
055public class RobotContainer {
056
057    // Gamepads
058    public final CommandXboxController driver = new CommandXboxController(Ports.Gamepad.DRIVER);
059
060    // Subsystem
061    private final Feeder feeder = Feeder.getInstance();
062
063    private final Intake intake = Intake.getInstance();
064
065    private final Shooter shooter = Shooter.getInstance();
066
067    private final CommandSwerveDrivetrain swerve = CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance();
068
069    private final LimelightVision vision = LimelightVision.getInstance();
070
071    private final LEDController leds = LEDController.getInstance();
072
073    private final Handoff handoff = Handoff.getInstance();
074
075    // Autons
076    private static SendableChooser<Command> autonChooser = new SendableChooser<>();
077
078    // Robot container
079
080    /** The container for the robot. Contains subsystems, OI devices, and commands. */
081    public RobotContainer() {
082        swerve.configureAutoBuilder();
083        configureDefaultCommands();
084        configureButtonBindings();
085        configureAutons();
086        SmartDashboard.putData("Field", Field.FIELD2D);
087    }
088
089    /** ************ */
090    /** DEFAULTS ** */
091    /** ************ */
092    private void configureDefaultCommands() {
093        swerve.setDefaultCommand(new SwerveDriveDrive(driver));
094        leds.setDefaultCommand(new LEDDefaultCommand());
095    }
096
097    /***************/
098    /*** BUTTONS ***/
099    /***************/
100
101    /**
102     * This method is used to configure button bindings for controlling the robot.
103   */
104    private void configureButtonBindings() {
105        // Trigger buttons did not work for some reason so I had to do this
106        Trigger leftTrigger = new Trigger(() -> driver.getLeftTriggerAxis() > 0.5);
107        Trigger rightTrigger = new Trigger(() -> driver.getRightTriggerAxis() > 0.5);
108
109        leftTrigger.onTrue(new IntakeSetIntake());
110        driver.leftBumper().whileTrue(new IntakeSetOuttake());
111        driver.leftBumper().onFalse(new IntakeSetIntake());
112
113        rightTrigger.onTrue(
114            new SwerveDriveAlignToHub()
115                .andThen(new SwerveDriveXMode())
116                .andThen(new ShooterWaitForSpinUp())
117                .andThen(new ShooterSetShoot())
118                .andThen(new HandoffSetForward())
119                .alongWith(new FeederSetForward(), new IntakeAgitateFastOnce().repeatedly()));
120
121        driver.y().onTrue(new IntakeSetIdle());
122        driver.rightBumper()
123            .onTrue(
124                new SwerveDriveAlignToFerryZone()
125                    .andThen(new SwerveDriveXMode())
126                    .andThen(new ShooterWaitForSpinUp())
127                    .andThen(new ShooterSetFerry())
128                    .andThen(new HandoffSetForward())
129                    .alongWith(new FeederSetForward(), new IntakeAgitateFastOnce().repeatedly()));
130        // Manual shooting possibly from in front of the tower
131        driver.a()
132            .whileTrue(
133                new SwerveDriveXMode()
134                    .andThen(new ShooterSetManual())
135                    .andThen(new ShooterWaitForSpinUp())
136                    .andThen(new HandoffSetForward().repeatedly())
137                    .alongWith(new FeederSetForward().repeatedly(), new IntakeAgitateFastOnce().repeatedly()));
138        // Top Right Paddle
139        driver.b()
140            .onTrue(
141                new HandoffSetIdle()
142                    .alongWith(
143                        new FeederSetIdle(),
144                        new IntakeSetHomingDown(),
145                        Commands.runOnce(
146                                () -> new SwerveDriveXMode().cancel())));
147        // Bottom Left Paddle
148        driver.x().whileTrue(new SwerveDriveXMode());
149
150        driver.povLeft().onTrue(new SwerveDriveResetRotation());
151        
152        driver.povUp()
153            .onTrue(new ShooterAddToBonusVelocity(50));
154        driver.povDown()
155            .onTrue(new ShooterAddToBonusVelocity(-50));
156
157    }
158
159    /**************/
160    /*** AUTONS ***/
161    /**************/
162
163    /**
164     * This method is used to configure the autonomous commands.
165     */
166     public void configureAutons() {
167        autonChooser.addOption("Do Nothing", new DoNothingAuton());
168        // AutonConfig LBFerry = new AutonConfig("LB Ferry", LBFerry::new,
169        // "LB to N Ferry",
170        // "N to LT Ferry",
171        // "LT Hub Ferry",
172        // "N to Depot Ferry");
173        // LBFerry.register(autonChooser);
174        // AutonConfig RBFerry = new AutonConfig("RB Ferry", RBFerry::new,
175        // "RB to N Ferry",
176        // "N to RT Ferry",
177        // "RT Hub Ferry",
178        // "N to Outpost Ferry");
179        // RBFerry.register(autonChooser);
180        // AutonConfig LBMid = new AutonConfig("LB Mid", LBMid::new,
181        // "LB to N Mid",
182        // "LB Return Mid");
183        // LBMid.register(autonChooser);
184        // AutonConfig LBStraight = new AutonConfig("LB Straight", LBStraight::new,
185        // "LB to N Straight",
186        // "N to LB Straight");
187        // LBStraight.register(autonChooser);
188        // AutonConfig RBStraight = new AutonConfig("RB Straight", RBStraight::new,
189        // "RB to N Straight",
190        // "N to RB Straight");
191        // RBStraight.register(autonChooser);
192        // AutonConfig RBMid = new AutonConfig("RB Mid", RBMid::new,
193        // "RB to N Mid",
194        // "RB Return Mid",
195        // "RB to Outpost Mid");
196        // RBMid.register(autonChooser);
197        // AutonConfig TwoMeterPath = new AutonConfig("Two Meter Path",
198        // TwoMeterPath::new,
199        // "2 meter path");
200        // TwoMeterPath.register(autonChooser);
201        // AutonConfig OutpostOnly = new AutonConfig("Outpost Only", OutpostOnly::new,
202        // "Outpost");
203        // OutpostOnly.register(autonChooser);
204        // AutonConfig RBOuttake = new AutonConfig("RB Outtake", RBOuttake::new,
205        // "RB to N Outtake",
206        // "N to RB Outtake");
207        // RBOuttake.register(autonChooser);
208        // AutonConfig LBOuttake = new AutonConfig("LB Outtake", LBOuttake::new,
209        // "LB to N Outtake",
210        // "N to LB Outtake");
211        // LBOuttake.register(autonChooser);
212        // AutonConfig LBMidlineSweep = new AutonConfig("LB Midline Sweep",
213        // LBMidlineSweep::new,
214        // "LB to N Midline",
215        // "LN Sweep Midline");
216        // LBMidlineSweep.register(autonChooser);
217        // AutonConfig RBMidlineSweep = new AutonConfig("RB Midline Sweep",
218        // RBMidlineSweep::new,
219        // "RB to N Midline",
220        // "RN Sweep Midline");
221        // RBMidlineSweep.register(autonChooser);
222        // AutonConfig LBDisrupt = new AutonConfig("LB Disrupt", LBDisrupt::new,
223        // "LB to CN Disrupt",
224        // "LN Circle Disrupt",
225        // "LN Circle Disrupt",
226        // "LB Disrupt Return");
227        // LBDisrupt.register(autonChooser);
228        // AutonConfig RBDisrupt = new AutonConfig("RB Disrupt", RBDisrupt::new,
229        // "RB to CN Disrupt",
230        // "RN Circle Disrupt",
231        // "RN Circle Disrupt",
232        // "RB Disrupt Return");
233        // RBDisrupt.register(autonChooser);
234        // AutonConfig LT_Disrupt = new AutonConfig("LT Disrupt", LTDisrupt::new,
235        // "LT to N Disrupt",
236        // "LT Circle Disrupt",
237        // "LT Circle Disrupt",
238        // "LT Side Push Disrupt",
239        // "LT Around Disrupt",
240        // "LT Back Push Disrupt");
241        // LT_Disrupt.register(autonChooser);
242        // AutonConfig RT_Disrupt = new AutonConfig("RT Disrupt", RTDisrupt::new,
243        // "RT to N Disrupt",
244        // "RT Circle Disrupt",
245        // "RT Circle Disrupt",
246        // "RT Side Push Disrupt",
247        // "RT Around Disrupt",
248        // "RT Back Push Disrupt");
249        // RT_Disrupt.register(autonChooser);
250        autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Dynamic Forwards",
251        swerve.sysIdDynamic(Direction.kForward));
252        autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Dynamic Backwards",
253        swerve.sysIdDynamic(Direction.kReverse));
254        autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Quasi Forwards",
255        swerve.sysIdQuasistatic(Direction.kForward));
256        autonChooser.addOption("SysID Module Translation Quasi Backwards",
257        swerve.sysIdQuasistatic(Direction.kReverse));
258        autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Dynamic Forwards",
259        swerve.sysidRotationDynamic(Direction.kForward));
260        autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Dynamic Backwards",
261        swerve.sysidRotationDynamic(Direction.kReverse));
262        autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Quasi Forwards",
263        swerve.sysidRotationQuasiStatic(Direction.kForward));
264        autonChooser.addOption("SysID Rotation Translation Quasi Backwards",
265        swerve.sysidRotationQuasiStatic(Direction.kReverse));
266        SmartDashboard.putData("Autonomous", autonChooser);
267    }
268
269    /**
270     * Use this to pass the autonomous command to the main {@link Robot} class.
271     * @return The command to run in autonomous
272     */
273    public Command getAutonomousCommand() {
274        return autonChooser.getSelected();
275    }
276}
